summary: Frontend-only review of the NEW product_type field + variation matrix swap, V2 PDP, Stripe checkout, and admin create/persist/delete flow. All critical scenarios PASS. No frontend bugs found that block the user-requested behavior.

tests_executed.admin_login: PASS — ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 logs in and lands on /admin
tests_executed.admin_projects_editor_dropdown_present: PASS — data-testid=admin-projects-product-type is rendered on /admin/projects -> Edit
tests_executed.engagement_ring_matrix_columns: PASS — matrix-14k-1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4 all present (admin-price-matrix testid present)
tests_executed.pendant_studs_matrix_swap: PASS — switching dropdown to 'pendant_studs' shows matrix-14k-{0.25,0.5,1,2,3,4,5,8,10}; engagement-only carats 1.5 and 2.5 disappear
tests_executed.wedding_band_metal_only: PASS — switching to 'wedding_band' shows single matrix-14k-0 column; matrix-14k-1 absent (label 'Price' header)
tests_executed.stand_alone_metal_only: PASS — same metal-only behavior: matrix-14k-0 present, matrix-14k-1 absent
tests_executed.custom_project_hides_table: PASS — switching to 'custom_project' removes admin-price-matrix and shows data-testid=admin-custom-no-pricing note
tests_executed.create_new_pendant_product_and_persist: PASS — created TEST Pendant Studs (slug test-pendant-2604, product_type=pendant_studs, collection engagement-rings, cells 14k 0.25=400, 14k 1=1000); after Save it appears in Published list. Re-opening Edit shows persisted product_type=pendant_studs, 14k-0.25=400, 14k-1=1000 and full pendant_studs carat column set
tests_executed.delete_test_product: PASS — trash icon delete (window.confirm auto-accepted) removed the test product; Published count returned to 3 and slug no longer in DOM after reload
tests_executed.v2_pdp_engagement_ring (/projects/3-40-c: PASS — data-testid=project-detail-v2 renders; v2-metal-{silver,10k,14k,18k,platinum} and v2-carat-{1,1.5,2,2.5,3,4} all present; selecting 18k+3ct updates v2-price from '$1,500+' to '$7,210+'
tests_executed.v2_add_to_bag_and_drawer: PASS — Add to bag opens cart drawer showing '3.40 Carat Oval Side Stone Engagement Ring · 18K Yellow Gold · 3 ct · $7,210'
tests_executed.stripe_checkout_redirect: PASS — Secure Checkout from drawer (14k + 2ct cart, $3,510) redirects to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_...

tests_skipped.custom_project_storefront_story_layout (: NOT EXECUTED — no seeded custom_project doc exists on the preview (the prior iteration's 'test-quote-only-piece' has been removed; visiting /projects/test-quote-only-piece now returns 'Piece not found'). Code path verified in /app/frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPageV2.js (`if (!project.buyable) return <CustomProjectView .../>`) and /app/frontend/src/components/store/CustomProjectView.js (data-testid='project-detail-cta' rendered). Main agent should manually create a custom_project via admin (Product type = Custom Project, published=true) and visit /projects/<slug> to spot-check end-to-end. Admin-side hiding of the matrix for custom_project is already verified.

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectsAdminPage.js: pencil Edit and trash Delete icon buttons in the project list have NO data-testid, NO title and NO aria-label. They are only positionally identifiable (button index 8/9 per row). Adding data-testid='admin-project-edit-{slug}' and 'admin-project-delete-{slug}' would make admin tests robust to layout changes.

ProjectsAdminPage.js: deep-linking /admin/projects/<slug> renders a blank page. The editor is only reachable by clicking the in-list pencil icon, which loses navigation state (back/forward, share, deep-link from email). Consider keying the route by slug so direct URL access works.

AdminLayout.js / ProjectsAdminPage.js: console emits multiple React hydration warnings ('In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<tr>/<tbody>/<th>/<td>'). These are decorative wrappers injected by an instrumentation library (x-ve-dynamic / x-file-name) but they cause invalid HTML in the rendered admin page. Worth investigating because they can cause subtle hydration mismatches.
V2 PDP price-matrix update on selection is instant; UI is consistent. No issues.
action_items: Add data-testid to the edit/delete icon buttons in /admin/projects rows (non-blocking; tests still pass positionally).
Optionally fix the React hydration warnings emitted by the admin layout instrumentation wrappers.
Optional: support deep-link /admin/projects/<slug> for the editor.
seed_data_creation: Created and DELETED a TEST Pendant Studs project (slug test-pendant-2604) during the create/persist/delete flow. No residual test data left in the system. Published project count is back to 3.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ALL 7 user-requested frontend behaviors for the product_type session change are validated: admin login, dropdown presence, matrix-column swap for engagement_ring/pendant_studs/wedding_band/stand_alone/custom_project, create+persist+delete of a pendant_studs product, V2 PDP for engagement ring (metal/carat/price), and Stripe checkout redirect. Only the custom_project STOREFRONT visual (CustomProjectView quote CTA + inquiry chat layout) was not visited because no custom_project doc is currently seeded — code path is correct and admin-side custom_project hide-matrix is already verified. Main agent may seed one custom_project (e.g. via /api/projects/api/create with X-API-Key and product_type='custom_project') and visit /projects/<slug> to confirm data-testid='project-detail-cta' renders. Admin row icon buttons have no testid/title — tests must address them positionally (pencil at button index 8, trash at index 9, after the sidebar header section).
